title: wp-env-bin E2E Config
description: E2E test environment configuration for the wp-env-bin local WordPress development tool.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON Schema file for this config.

items.description: Path to a block directory containing editor E2E tests.

editor.description: Block directories to include in editor (block editor) E2E test runs. Defaults to [].

items.description: Path to a block directory containing frontend E2E tests.

frontend.description: Block directories to include in frontend E2E test runs. Defaults to [].

wpVersion.description: WordPress version to use in the test environment. Defaults to '6.9.4'.

phpVersion.description: PHP version to use in the test environment. Defaults to '8.3'.

testTheme.description: WordPress theme slug to activate in the test environment. Defaults to 'twentytwentyfive'.

port.description: HTTP port for the test environment. Defaults to '8886'.

mysqlPort.description: MySQL port for the test environment. Defaults to 51606.

testMysqlPort.description: Secondary MySQL port for the test environment. Defaults to 51607.

wpConstants.description: WordPress configuration constants to define in the test environment (wp-config.php).

WP_DEBUG.description: Enable WordPress debug mode. Defaults to false.

WP_DEBUG_LOG.description: Save debug messages to a log file. Defaults to false.

WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY.description: Display debug messages on screen. Defaults to false.

SCRIPT_DEBUG.description: Force WordPress to use unminified JS and CSS. Defaults to false.

DISABLE_WP_CRON.description: Disable the WordPress pseudo-cron scheduler. Defaults to true.
